meaning: n.古人相信存在于世界北端的国家,极北之地
examples: Life for the descendants of the Thule people is still harsh.
These Thule people moved in from Alaska, bringing kayaks, sleds, dogs, pottery and iron tools.
Application is the ultima Thule of study.
As a spur to the romantic imagination, Thule has been more successful--or, at least, influential.
Since then, explorers and geographers have fruitlessly sought to identify Thule based on these scant ancient references.
